mapper.sql: id, title, note, ndate, img, type, total, sid, shop
mapper.insert: insert into wct_room (id, title, note, ndate, img, type, total, sid, shop) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ndate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{total,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{shop,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into wct_room
id,
title,
note,
ndate,
img,
type,
total,
sid,
shop,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ndate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{img,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{total,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{shop,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update wct_room
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
note = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ndate = #{ndate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img = #{img,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
total = #{total,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sid = #{sid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
shop = #{shop,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update wct_room set title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, note = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ndate = #{ndate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, img = #{img,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total = #{total,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sid = #{sid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, shop = #{shop,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
